spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (direction, getall, getallkeys, getallrecords) and 5 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface: 11 form controls wired to ~8038 chars of script that mutate the page state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and concept lede share 8 keywords; the page delivers what the index promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Page feature-detects the API and shows both the supported and unsupported branches (try/catch + missing-API messaging).

references.rationale: Missing the required chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link — this breaks the self-heal recovery rule in CLAUDE.md.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on-system, but: raw hex colours used (#e8eeff, #edfdf0, #fde8e8).

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus.com/feature/5124331450138624 reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5124331450138624 in its references section. This is the self-heal anchor for the slug-fix recovery script.

openQuestions.title: Fix design-system regressions
openQuestions.detail: Issues found: raw hex colours used (#e8eeff, #edfdf0, #fde8e8). Convert raw hex to the existing CSS variables (--bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted, --border-black, --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose) and make sure any button background override also restates color.

summary: 1 rubric fails — the open questions list the must-fix items before this page is ready to ship.
